commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: He says that the church’s order has been so formed as to join the human race together in the profession of unity, so that all may be in Christ, having Christ as their single head, that is, as the source of life. .

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Perceive ye the dignity of the office? Each one edifies, each one perfects, each one ministers.
